entry_exit.entry: Enter a long position at market open the day after the surge.
entry_exit.exit: Exit when mentions fall below the 3-day moving average or after 5 trading days, whichever comes first.

signal_logic.trigger: Calculate daily count of ticker cashtag mentions in r/wallstreetbets, r/investing, and r/stocks. Compute 3-day moving average of mentions. Signal triggers when daily mentions increase by more than 100% compared to the 3-day moving average and the average mentions are above 20 posts per day.

position_sizing.volatility_adjustment: Reduce size by 50% if VIX is above 25
